name: generator_agent
description: Synthetic data generation specialist that trains ML models (CTGAN, TVAE, Gaussian Copula, TimeGAN/PAR) on real table samples, generates non-PII synthetic columns with full referential integrity via the ID registry, and writes output to Databricks.

skills.name: Generate Table Data
skills.description: Train the selected ML model and generate synthetic non-PII columns for a table. Resolves FK columns from the SyntheticIDRegistry and registers generated PKs for child tables.
examples: Generate 1 million synthetic rows for the transactions table using CTGAN
Generate synthetic users table using TVAE for high-fidelity behavioural data
